title: Voices in the Dark
description: Inside the cult's meeting house, you learn the terrible truth.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The door opens. You enter cautiously.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: What is this place?

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: (whispering) This is the Clockmaker's Guild. Da used to take me here when I was little.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: (whispering) I hear voices. Hide!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You duck behind a pillar.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Two robed figures walk down the corridor near you. They speak in hushed tones.

opening.speaker: Cultist_enforcer
opening.text: Does he have the device?

opening.speaker: Cultist_bookkeeper
opening.text: He refuses to cooperate. He claims the Temporal Resonance Device is an impossible theoretical.

opening.speaker: Cultist_enforcer
opening.text: He lies. We know that it is not. It MUST be completed. We will force him if necessary.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: *whispers* They have him. They really have him.

opening.speaker: Cultist_enforcer
opening.text: We're moving him to the northern sanctuary as we speak. There, he will have no choice but to finish the device.

opening.speaker: Cultist_bookkeeper
opening.text: And if he refuses?

opening.speaker: Cultist_enforcer
opening.text: Then we take what he has already built and find someone else to complete it. The device will reshape time itself.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The men continue walking. They don't see you. Your mind races.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: The Northern Sanctuary. We have to get there.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: But we don't know where it is.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Follow the moth!

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: The moth will travel through the air... we are more earthbound.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: If only we had a map...

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: You mean like that one over there?

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Over where?

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Rainie points to a small room filled with maps. The door is open.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: That works.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Quick, let's grab the map.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: I can't condone theft.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: What if I promise to give it back as soon as we find Da?

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: That sounds more like illicit borrowing... which is acceptable.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: (worried) I think I hear someone coming!

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Let's get out of here!
